HI David! Linking storefronts is very simple! Head to the profile of the vendor you are looking to connect with by using the "search vendor" tab in your dashboard. Once you view their storefront in the upper right hand corner of their profile there is a "invite to storefront button" Once clicked the other vendor will manually accept your invite!

Hey Paola and Daniel! You’re planning a wedding and looking for a photographer which means you’ve probably been bombarded with them throwing fancy words at you like timeless, dreamy, romantic… but what does that even mean?  I’m T.J. the photographer and owner of Ladman Studios, and I’m not here to sell you on some cookie-cutter version of wedding photography. I'm here to make sure your wedding photos actually feel like your day, not some Pinterest board of staged moments that never happened.  Because here’s the thing, your wedding will be full of energy, emotion, and moments that can’t be recreated. The way you look at each other when you’re not paying attention. Your family and friends getting emotional during the vows. And everyone breaking out their best dance moves of the night. That’s the good stuff. That’s the stuff I capture.  So, if you’re looking for a photographer who will just show up, snap a few basic photos, and send you on your way—that’s not me. But if you want someone who’s going to document your wedding in a way that feels real, unscripted, and damn good? Let’s talk!  No pressure, no sales pitch's, just seeing if we’re the right fit.
Feel free to check out my website to see some amazing wedding photos from couples who wanted to remember how the day felt and not just how it looked. www.ladmanstudios.com/portfolio

Your wedding will be full of energy, emotion, and moments you can’t recreate. The way you look at each other when you think no one’s watching. The mix of happy tears and loud laughter during the vows. Your friends going all in on the dance floor. That’s what I capture—the real, unfiltered, unforgettable moments that make your wedding yours.

If you just want basic wedding photos that check a box, I’m probably not the right fit. But if you want wedding photos that feel alive and authentic, let's talk.  No pressure, no sales pitches, just seeing if we’re the right fit.
Take a look at some of the couples I’ve worked with. People who wanted to remember not just how their wedding looked, but how it felt. Check it out here: www.ladmanstudios.com/portfolio.
Looking forward to hearing all about your day!  T.J.

HI Debra! Great question—I really appreciate you reaching out! Like any social platform, it’s all about finding a balance you’re comfortable with when meeting and collaborating with new people. Since WIN is built on growing your business through collaborations, connecting with new vendors is a big part of that.  I completely understand the importance of referrals and wanting to ensure quality before recommending someone. I’d suggest starting with a message to introduce yourself and see where the connection goes. You can always let them know you’d like to get to know them better before referring them or “connecting storefronts.” Most vendors will respect that honesty!  That said, being open to new relationships and connections is key to WIN’s vision, and I encourage you to explore opportunities as they come. Let me know if you have any other questions! 😊
